---
title: "Personal"
---

Outside of work, I enjoy spending time with my family, traveling and exploring new places, baking, and reading books. I also enjoy presenting my research at conferences and connecting with researchers from different fields.

<div class="slideshow-container">
  <img class="slide active" src="images/personal/photo1.jpg" alt="Personal photo 1">
  <img class="slide" src="images/personal/photo2.jpg" alt="Personal photo 2">
  <img class="slide" src="images/personal/photo3.jpg" alt="Personal photo 3">
  <img class="slide" src="images/personal/photo4.jpg" alt="Personal photo 4">
  <img class="slide" src="images/personal/photo5.jpg" alt="Personal photo 5">
  <img class="slide" src="images/personal/photo6.jpg" alt="Personal photo 6">
  <img class="slide" src="images/personal/photo7.jpg" alt="Personal photo 7">
  <img class="slide" src="images/personal/photo8.jpg" alt="Personal photo 8">
</div>

<script>
let slideIndex = 0;
const slides = document.querySelectorAll(".slide");

function showSlides() {
  slides.forEach((slide) => slide.classList.remove("active"));
  slideIndex = (slideIndex + 1) % slides.length;
  slides[slideIndex].classList.add("active");
}

setInterval(showSlides, 2000);
</script>
